fields.title: Black Panther
fields.description: In the heart of Africa lies the hidden, technologically advanced nation of Wakanda. When King T'Challa's father dies, he must step into his role as the new Black Panther. As T'Challa grapples with his responsibilities and leadership, he faces a dangerous challenge from Erik Killmonger, a vengeful outsider who seeks to take the throne. Filled with stunning action, powerful themes of identity, legacy, and justice, Black Panther delivers a cinematic experience that celebrates culture and courage.

fields.title: Avengers: Endgame
fields.description: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the remaining Avengers and their allies must come together for one final mission: to undo the chaos caused by Thanos. With the universe at stake, the team embarks on a daring plan to collect the Infinity Stones from different points in time. Avengers: Endgame is a heart-pounding, emotional conclusion to the Infinity Saga, bringing together unforgettable characters, epic battles, and powerful moments of sacrifice and heroism.

fields.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
fields.description: In The Amazing Spider-Man, we follow the journey of Peter Parker, a teenager grappling with the mystery of his parents' disappearance and newfound powers. After being bitten by a radioactive spider, Peter transforms into Spider-Man, gaining incredible abilities. As he navigates the challenges of being a superhero, Peter faces the villainous Dr. Curt Connors, whose transformation into the Lizard threatens the city. A fresh take on the iconic hero, this film explores themes of responsibility, loss, and the power of self-discovery.

fields.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
fields.description: After his unforgettable battle with the Avengers, 15-year-old Peter Parker is eager to prove himself as a true hero. Juggling high school life with his secret identity as Spider-Man, Peter faces his biggest challenge yet: the menacing Vulture, a dangerous criminal who threatens his city. As Peter strives to balance his life as a teenager and a superhero, he learns valuable lessons about responsibility, trust, and what it truly means to be a hero. Spider-Man: Homecoming delivers a fun, youthful take on the beloved web-slinger.

fields.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
fields.description: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse introduces Miles Morales, a teenager from Brooklyn who is bitten by a radioactive spider, gaining spider-like abilities. When a multiverse collision causes different versions of Spider-Man to emerge, Miles must team up with these unique heroes—including the iconic Peter B. Parker, Spider-Gwen, and more—to stop the villainous Kingpin from destroying all realities. With stunning animation, heart-pounding action, and a story about embracing one's destiny, Into the Spider-Verse is a visually groundbreaking and emotionally charged adventure for all ages.
